slides.title: Tokenized Bonds
slides.subtitle:
Revolutionizing Fixed Income
Powered by SettleMint DALP

slides.title: The $130T Opportunity
slides.body:
• Global bond market: $130+ trillion
• Annual issuance: $5-7 trillion
• Traditional settlement: T+2 to T+3

Tokenization unlocks:
• Fractional ownership
• 24/7 trading
• Instant settlement

slides.title: Challenges with Traditional Bonds
slides.body:
• High minimum investment
• Slow settlement (T+2/T+3)
• Limited retail access
• Manual coupon payments
• Complex custody infrastructure

slides.title: SettleMint DALP Solution
slides.body:
• Issue bonds as digital tokens
• Smart contracts automate coupon payments
• Fractionalize for broader investor access
• Real-time settlement on-chain
• Multi-chain deployment

slides.title: Benefits for Issuers
slides.col1:
Lower costs
• Reduce manual issuance steps across teams.
• Automate compliance and investor controls.
• Cut reconciliation and reporting overhead.
• Preserve stronger audit evidence across the workflow.
slides.col2:
Broader access
• Reach more investor segments with smaller ticket sizes.
• Support distribution through governed onboarding flows.
• Expand placement options without rebuilding the product.
• Give treasury and legal teams clearer control points.

slides.title: Benefits for Investors
slides.col1:
Faster liquidity
• Support secondary transfer processes with clearer rules.
• Reduce settlement delays and manual handoffs.
• Improve visibility into holding and transfer status.
• Create a more usable investor experience.
slides.col2:
More transparency
• Keep transaction history and servicing events visible.
• Link policy checks to the transfer workflow itself.
• Improve confidence through governed controls.
• Reduce ambiguity around who can hold and trade.

slides.title: DALP Technical Architecture
slides.body:
Token Standard: ERC-1400

Smart Contracts:
• Atomic issuance
• Transfer restrictions (SBT)
• Coupon payment automation
• Multi-currency support

Oracle Integration:
• Price feeds
• Interest rate benchmarks

slides.title: Token Lifecycle Management
slides.body:
Complete bond lifecycle on-chain:
• Issuance & onboarding
• Coupon calculations
• Corporate actions
• Interest payments
• Principal repayment
• Burn/retirement

slides.title: Use Cases
slides.item1:
Corporate bonds
Structure issuance, distribution, and servicing on one governed platform for repeatable fixed-income launches.
slides.item2:
Sovereign debt
Support treasury-style instruments with policy controls, investor eligibility, and auditable operating steps.
slides.item3:
Green bonds
Pair sustainability-linked issuance narratives with compliance controls and clearer lifecycle governance.
slides.item4:
Structured products
Model more complex debt programs without forcing every launch back into bespoke operational handling.

slides.title: Case: FAB Digital Bond
slides.body:
First Abu Dhabi Bank $100M digital bond:

Results:
• 50% reduction in issuance costs
• Settlement in minutes vs. days
• 3x increase in investor reach
